title: Require Agent Plugin Command Channel Topology
forbids: a second curated command namespace, nested command aliases, or external-extension commands under the curated channel
why: Command authority is determined by its namespace axis: curated lifecycle is under rawr agent plugins, while external Oclif extension management is under rawr plugins.
remediate: Place curated lifecycle commands under agent/plugins, vendor commands under agent/plugins/vendors, and external extension commands under plugins.
message: Plugin commands must remain in their closed curated or external channel.
